title: Venture Capital on Instagram: "Hark, an AI lab building models and ...
full_text:
tradedvc on May 21, 2026: "Hark, an AI lab building models and hardware for a “universal” AI personal assistant interface, raised $700M in Series A funding at a $6B post-money valuation. The round was led by Parkway Venture Capital and included Align Ventures, AMD Ventures, ARK Invest, Brookfield, Greycroft, Intel Capital, Prime Movers Lab, Qualcomm Ventures, Salesforce Ventures, and Tamarack Global. Founded by Brett Adcock, who also serves as CEO and previously founded Figure AI and Archer, Hark plans to use the capital to expand its team, secure compute and components, and develop multimodal models alongside future AI-native hardware devices.
FOUNDER: Brett Adcock
INVESTORS: Parkway Venture Capital, Align Ventures, AMD Ventures, ARK Invest, Brookfield, Greycroft, Intel Capital, Prime Movers Lab, Qualcomm Ventures, Salesforce Ventures & Tamarack Global
ROUND: Series A
AMOUNT: $700,000,000
VALUATION: $6,000,000,000
HQ: San Francisco, California
#VentureCapital #Hark #BrettAdcock #TradedVC".
